subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification befit the Lord of Names and Creator of heaven, Whose Word hath become as a sword unto them that have joined partners with God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا مالک اسما و فاطر سما را لایق و سزا که کلمه اش از برای مشرکین سیف
